calendar.matters:
CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Dismissing Pltfs' Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court'S Prior Order;
Off Calendar Jan-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance and dismisses the complaint. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Continued To Feb-28-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents and to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to provide complete, verified answers without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiffs are ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule their depositions. The depositions are to be completed by October 14, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
